title: Innovative Herbal Chinese Chicken Char Siu Bao
description: This low-carb-friendly dish features chicken stock, candy, and herbal notes in a traditional Chinese char siu bao format, originating from the Fujian province
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together almond flour, salt, and pepper
In a separate bowl, mix together chicken stock, crushed rock candy, dried mint leaves, and dried basil leaves
Add the chicken breast to the bowl with the wet ingredients and marinate for 30 minutes
Remove the chicken from the marinade and coat with the dry ingredients
Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat and sear the chicken until browned on all sides
Transfer the chicken to a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes
While the chicken is baking, mix the egg with a little water to create an egg wash
Brush the egg wash over the baked chicken and return to the oven for an additional 5 minutes
Allow the chicken to cool before slicing into thin strips
Assemble the char siu bao by placing the chicken strips onto a low-carb-friendly bun and serving immediately
